description_long: This object consists of a tall, square, reddish-brown planter pot filled with soil and supporting several long, slender green stems topped with orange, daisy-like flowers. The flowers have multiple thin petals radiating from a central disc, with some petals appearing slightly wilted or uneven. The stems are thin and upright, with a few bent or leaning at angles, and there are no visible leaves attached to the stems. The pot has a marbled texture and a matte finish, giving it a natural stone or ceramic appearance. The soil inside the pot is dark and slightly uneven, suggesting a realistic planting environment. This decorative flower arrangement would be suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near building entrances in an urban setting.
description: A tall, square, reddish-brown planter holds several orange, daisy-like flowers with thin petals and long green stems. The pot has a marbled texture and contains dark soil.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square planter with several orange flowers and upright stems, with the marbled pot texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights more of the flower heads and reveals some stems leaning outward, with the soil surface visible.
description_view_2: The planter is seen from a side angle, showing a cluster of flower heads and the depth of the pot.
description_view_3: This view displays the arrangement of stems and flowers from another side, emphasizing the marbled texture and the density of the stems.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged radially around a central disc, forming a daisy-like pattern with some overlapping and layering, exhibiting radial symmetry.
